display_name: BMAD Method — Breakthrough Agile AI Driven Development
description: BMAD Method — a breakthrough methodology for Agile AI-driven development (40.6K stars). Structured around AI personas/agents in YAML format, workflow definitions, and task templates. Core module (bmad-master orchestrator) plus BMM (BMAD Method Module) with specialist agents, teams, data, and workflows. Designed for full AI-assisted SDLC.
author: bmad-code-org
notes: BMAD Method defines AI agent personas in YAML. Core: bmad-master orchestrator. BMM: full set of specialist agents and teams. Workflows for brainstorming, party-mode. Tasks: advanced-elicitation, editorial-review, adversarial-review, edge-case-hunter, doc-shard. Reference docs in docs/explanation and docs/reference. NOTE: No license file (NOASSERTION) — use with attribution.
